code: installation from R-universe install.packages(   "vimcheck",    repos = c(     "https://vimc.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"   ) ) install.packages("pak") pak::pak("vimc/vimcheck")

what: Sanity checks on burden estimates — basic_burden_sanity
title: Sanity checks on burden estimates — basic_burden_sanity
text: Helper function sanity checks burden estimate values. Checks whether burden estimates non-numeric, missing, negative.

title: Sanity checks on burden estimates — basic_burden_sanity
Sanity checks on burden estimates — basic_burden_sanity
text: burden <data.frame> disease burden estimates. Must least single column named "value" numeric burden estimates.

title: Sanity checks on burden estimates — basic_burden_sanity
text: character vector messages generated checks burden estimates, length vector depending many checks fail.

title: Validate file dictionary template — validate_file_dict_template

Validate file dictionary template — validate_file_dict_template
text: disease disease identifier. path_burden directory burden estimate data.

title: Validate file dictionary template — validate_file_dict_template
text: Nothing; called primarily side-effects. file path_burden/file_dictionary.csv exist, file dictionary CSV file written location. Prints message screen informing user whether action taken.

title: vimcheck 0.0.1
text: Added GHA workflows notify changed dependencies, auto-render README.md README.Rmd, update copyright year annually. Added reference VIMC paper (Echeverria-Londono et al. 2021). Added .gitattributes marking autogenerated Readme docs files .
